metadata.title: custom-cursor
metadata.description: Add cursor customisability options, including a smooth typing animation.

regex.target: .setName("平滑输入速度（以毫秒为单位）")

regex.source: .setDesc("The colour of the cursor icon. Defaults to (dark-mode dependent) black or white.")
regex.target: .setDesc("光标图标的颜色。默认为黑色或白色（取决于深色模式）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The number of seconds to complete one full cursor blink cycle.")
regex.target: .setDesc("完成一次完整光标闪烁周期的秒数。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The number of seconds after cursor movement before blinking begins.")
regex.target: .setDesc("光标移动后开始闪烁前的秒数。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The number of milliseconds for the cursor icon to reach the true cursor location after typing or moving the cursor. 0 for instant speed.")
regex.target: .setDesc("光标图标在输入或移动后到达真实光标位置所需的毫秒数。0 表示瞬间完成。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The width of the cursor icon in pixels.")
regex.target: .setDesc("光标图标宽度，以像素为单位。")
